scores.notes: Company name mostly correct but missing punctuation and spacing errors; address partially correct with misspellings (e.g., 'BANRU' vs 'BAHRU', 'NOSI' vs 'NO.'); date correctly extracted; total amount correct; table structure poorly preserved with garbled and unrelated text in place of expected columns; layout reading order disrupted by extraneous text; some ground truth text missing or distorted.
